description: A retailer calls to get the status of a recent order.

nodes.task_description: Identify the retailer and their order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the order in the system.

nodes.task_description: Check the real-time status of the order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sees the order has been packed and is awaiting carrier pickup.

nodes.task_description: Inform the retailer of the current status.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent tells the retailer their order is scheduled to ship today.
